intent: Distribute patient samples from 96-well source plates to 384-well destination plates using P20 multichannel pipette. Transfer specified sample volumes from each source column to 4 wells in the 384-well plate (2 wells from first destination column, 2 wells from second destination column), with optional no-template control inclusion. Execute transfers with disposal volume and precise well positioning offset by 8% of well diameter.

output_schema.protocol_name: PCR/qPCR prep: distribute samples to 384 well plates
output_schema.author: Steve Plonk <protocols@opentrons.com>
